ddls:
CREATE TABLE "plans" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each plan */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the plan is offered */,
  "plan_name" TEXT /* Name of the 529 College Savings Plan */,
  "performance_score" REAL /* Performance score of the plan */,
  "details_link" TEXT /* Link to the plan details or enrollment page */,
  "management_fees" REAL /* Annual management fees for the plan */,
  "minimum_contribution" REAL /* Minimum contribution required for the plan */,
  "maximum_contribution" REAL /* Maximum contribution allowed for the plan */,
  "tax_benefits" TEXT /* Tax benefits offered by the plan */,
  "investment_options" TEXT /* Investment options available in the plan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plans_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Two-letter abbreviation of the state */,
  "state_tax_benefit" TEXT /* Description of state tax benefits for 529 plans */,
  "state_website" TEXT /* Link to the state's official website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., parent, financial advisor, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the user */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the user resides */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* State where the user resides */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the user's address */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_favorites" (
  "favorite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each favorite entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who saved the plan */,
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plan saved as a favorite */,
  "added_date" TEXT /* Date when the plan was added to favorites */,
  "notes" TEXT /* User notes or comments about the plan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("favorite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_favorites_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_favorites_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("plan_id") REFERENCES plans ("plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plan_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance entry */,
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plan */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the performance score is recorded */,
  "performance_score" REAL /* Performance score of the plan for the specified year */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Ranking of the plan within its peer group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plan_performance_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("plan_id") REFERENCES plans ("plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plan_investment_options" (
  "option_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investment option */,
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plan */,
  "option_name" TEXT /* Name of the investment option */,
  "option_type" TEXT /* Type of investment option (e.g., stock, bond, ETF) */,
  "option_description" TEXT /* Description of the investment option */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("option_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plan_investment_options_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("plan_id") REFERENCES plans ("plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plan_expenses" (
  "expense_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expense */,
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plan */,
  "expense_type" TEXT /* Type of expense (e.g., management fee, administrative fee) */,
  "expense_amount" REAL /* Amount of the expense */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expense_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plan_expenses_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("plan_id") REFERENCES plans ("plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recommended plan */,
  "recommendation_date" TEXT /* Date when the recommendation was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_recommendations_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("plan_id") REFERENCES plans ("plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reporting" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., plan performance, user engagement) */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data contained in the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reporting_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
